pi_items.source: Verified by checking setup_task.sh which opens the SRS document, and export_result.sh which exports the SRS.json file.
Verified by task instruction and verifier.py logic.
Verified against the task description text and expected_formula_components in verifier.py.
Verified against verifier.py which accepts any of these delimiters for the LaTeX formula.

privileged_info_summary: The target document for the requirement is the SRS document. The new requirement must be titled 'Altitude Control Loop'. Its description must include the introductory text 'standard PID algorithm' and the specific components of the PID control law formula in LaTeX format (including u(t), K_p, K_i, int_0^t, and frac{de(t)}{dt}) surrounded by valid LaTeX delimiters ($$, \[, or \().
